title: No More Useless Keys - NMUK
description: Allows you to add alternative key combinations to every key binding!
body:
Did you ever stumble upon the fact that there are more than 70 keys on your keyboard but Minecraft only uses like twenty of them? Did you ever enjoy the satisfaction of seeing everything happening at once when hitting your head on your keyboard? *Then I have the right mod for you.* ---
## About This mod allows you to define an arbitrary number of alternative key combinations for every key binding. ![screenshot](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Siphalor/nmuk/1.16/screenshots/screenshot-0.png) ## Compatibility This mod is proud to be in the sisterhood of [Amecs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/amecs) and to be completely compatible with it. (This was not trivial)
